contact.label: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

services.label: Services
services.mainTitle: We provide end to end digital services tailored to your business goals

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: We create custom websites that are tailored to your business goals. Our websites are designed to be user-friendly, responsive, and optimized for search engines.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Scale your business with professional e-commerce solutions. We build secure, scalable, and high-converting online stores that drive growth.

mobileApps.title: Mobile Apps
mobileApps.description: Reach your customers anywhere with custom mobile applications. We develop high-performance iOS and Android apps with seamless user experiences.

crm.title: CRM
crm.description: Streamline your business operations with custom CRM solutions. We build powerful, scalable, and easy-to-use CRM systems that help you manage customer relationships and drive growth.

erp.title: ERP
erp.description: Transform your business with our custom ERP solutions. We build powerful, scalable, and easy-to-use ERP systems that help you manage your entire business operations and drive growth.

customDevelopment.title: Custom Development
customDevelopment.description: We build custom software solutions tailored to your specific business needs. From web applications to complex enterprise systems, our team delivers high-quality, scalable, and reliable software that drives real business value.

projects.label: ◯ Our Projects
projects.title: A selection of projects we’ve built across different industries and technologies

expert_test.title: Expert Test
expert_test.description: Expert Test is an online examination platform. It helps students and professionals to test their knowledge with timed assignments and detailed results.

techjobs.title: TechJobs
techjobs.description: TechJobs is a recruitment platform for tech professionals. It connects the world's best developers with top tech companies through a streamlined hiring process.

about.label: ◯ About
about.title: We create solutions that improve processes and deliver real value

grid.item1: Listening to the client and deeply understanding the problem
grid.item2: Developing a clear plan and a strong technical solution
grid.item3: Building the product through a transparent and structured process
grid.item4: Testing the result and delivering a fully ready final product

about.footer: By combining innovative thinking and reliable technology, we create digital solutions that help businesses build stronger, smarter and more competitive products.

hero.description: We help businesses move faster with clear and efficient IT solutions. Devline combines modern technology with a simple approach to create digital products that are reliable, secure, and ready to scale.

clean_architecture.title: Clean Architecture
clean_architecture.description: Our systems are built with clean, scalable, and well-structured architecture for long-term stability.

transparent_process.title: Transparent Process
transparent_process.description: You stay informed at every stage through open communication and clear project milestones.

reliable_results.title: Reliable Results
reliable_results.description: We focus on solutions that work consistently and support real business growth.

contactPage.description: Ready to take your project to the next level? Contact us now and get a free consultation.
